GoalOS RSI TheatreLoop → governance → dossier
ConciergeCommand CenterLoop ReactorLoop → RSIConstitutionEvidenceLegal
Sovereign Invention Governance · deterministic discovery → auditable advantage

A loop can restart.
RSI can govern invention.

Run a browser-local demonstration of the transition from a long-running agent loop to a deterministic RSI control plane: TARGET → EMIT → FILTER → ATLAS → TEST-PLAN → EVAL → INSERT → PROMOTE. Search can guide exploration, but only evidence, baselines, replay, risk, persistence, and human authority can promote.

Public-safe demonstration only. No account, no form, no wallet, no token approval, no network request, no browser storage, no transaction broadcast, no funds moved, no production authority, and no user data wanted.

Control law
RSIoutcome authority is mechanicalTARGETEMITFILTERATLASTESTEVALINSERTPROMOTE
0cycle index
E0ECI level
0.42novelty
DENYauthority
01 · Mission seed

The preset changes local demonstration text only. No data leaves the browser.

02 · RSI pipeline
READY · search control is not outcome authority

Define the mandate, then let the control plane allocate exploration without letting novelty bypass evidence.

  1. Awaiting first RSI cycle.
03 · Mechanical gates
Risk gateALLOW
Evidence gateE0
Baseline gatePENDING
Persistence gatePENDING
Replay gateREADY
04 · Tune the invention loop
05 · From loop state to RSI state
loop/contract.jsonMission contract pending.
rsi/state_manifest.jsoncycle_index: 0 · drift_sentinel: armed
evidence/eci_ledger.jsonlE0 simulated reasoning only.
dossier/move37.mdNo Move-37 candidate admitted.
06 · Breakthrough discipline

Probe first.

High novelty does not lower the burden of proof. It raises it: reproduce, stress-test, persist, then package a dossier.

candidate cards0
baseline comparisons0
shock tests0
dossier pages0
Loop → RSI transformation

The loop repeats work. RSI governs what may improve.

Prompt

One instruction

Useful for a single answer; fragile for day-scale work.

Loop

Restartable procedure

Writes contract, progress, trace, and bottleneck outside context.

GoalOS

Proof-gated institution

Turns outputs into Evidence Dockets, governed decision states, Chronicle entries, and reusable capability.

RSI

Deterministic invention governance

Controls recursive improvement with append-only state, baseline discipline, ECI, Move-37 dossier packaging, and mechanical authority gates.

Search control ≠ outcome authority

OMNI may allocate attention. It never admits outcomes.

Interestingness can decide where to look next. It cannot insert candidates, inflate confidence, approve settlement, bypass risk, override baselines, or authorize deployment.

allocationallowedinsertiongate-onlypromotiondossier-onlydeploymenthuman boundary
Outcome authority

Risk × Evidence × Baseline × Persistence × Replay × Validator

Any zero in a hard gate blocks promotion, even when novelty is high or the candidate looks persuasive.

Public-safe claim boundary

This demo is not a claim of achieved RSI, AGI, ASI, SOTA, or autonomous authority.

It is a browser-local control-plane demonstration. Stronger claims require real tasks, baselines, executed evidence, replayable ProofBundles, cost/risk ledgers, validator reports, delayed outcomes, and independent review.

ObjectiveLoopRSI StateEvidenceBaselineShockDossierHuman ReviewChronicle
